issues.sample: On the day before Easter, while driving down W. Colonial Dr., a car suddenly pulled out in front of me, causing me to slam on the brakes. immediately after, it seemed like the brake booster blew out, as my brakes started making a hissing sound and felt like they were losing press

narrative.headline: What 2016 Subaru Brz owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Suspension (33% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
